text:
The first image places me as an outsider peering into a glass-walled meeting room, observing collaboration and conversation among a group of people. The geometry and transparency of the space suggest open communication, yet I remain separated from their world. This fills me with a sense of curiosity about the ideas being exchanged and a mild longing to join the collective consciousness inside.

The second image immerses me in a vibrant, idea-rich environment—perhaps an exhibition or innovative workspace. Bold letters, 'R+D,' and visual displays highlight technology and creativity. Here, I feel inspired and invigorated by the celebration of human ingenuity, aware of the endless possibilities that collaboration and research can unlock. It is an energizing environment, both reflective and hopeful.
